subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-22 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: From the moment the Supreme Pen first wrote of the Persians, glorifying them and showing His respect for them, that people grew increasingly exalted
subcodes.first_line_orig: از روزیکه قلم اعلی دربارهٴ فارسیان حرکت نمود و ارادهٴ مبارکه بر عزت و احترامشان تعلق یافت
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @past, present and future of Iran, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
